title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run software with full access to Ubuntu, databases, storage, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live application deployment by providing agents with a complete workspace for end-to-end software development and hosting.
